name: Human
description: Standard baseline humanity across the Megaverse.

name: Nightbane
description: Dual-form R.C.C. — Facade humans who manifest a unique Morphus after the Becoming. Select a Nightbane skill package (Basic, Resistance/Spook Squad, Nocturne, or Warlord).

classAbilities.name: The Becoming
classAbilities.description: Shift between Facade and Morphus at will (one full melee round; M.E. save 12+ reduces to ~3 seconds). +1 to save at 1st level, +1 per two levels thereafter.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 200 ft (Facade) or 500 ft (Morphus). Sense other Nightbane within 300 ft + 30 ft per level; automatic recognition when visible, Perception roll for direction/distance when not.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Attributes & Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Morphus: +10 P.S., P.E., Spd; +6 P.P.; Supernatural Strength damage. Regenerate 10 S.D.C./H.P. per melee round (overwhelmed by sustained automatic fire).

classAbilities.name: Mirror Walk
classAbilities.description: Morphus only — cross to/from the Nightlands through a mirrored counterpart (2 P.P.E., one melee round; carry up to 100 lb, or 1 P.P.E. per 2 lb for passengers/cargo).

classAbilities.name: Immunities
classAbilities.description: Immune to all mind control (including vampiric control), spells, and psionics that impose mind control; immune to vampire slow-kill bite.

classAbilities.name: Morphus Combat
classAbilities.description: Innate Hand to Hand: Martial Arts in Morphus (+1 attack per melee, +1 initiative, +2 strike/parry/dodge, +3 roll/pull punch, +4 save vs magic, +3 save vs psionics/disease/horror factor). Facade uses normal hand to hand only.

classAbilities.name: Talents
classAbilities.description: One free Talent at 1st level; additional free Talents at levels 4, 7, 10, and 12. More may be purchased by permanently spending P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Immune to Transformations
classAbilities.description: Cannot be physically transformed by metamorphosis, petrification, vampire transformation, curses, wishes, or similar magic.

name: Guardian
description: An ancient, enigmatic race of supernatural beings composed of light and energy, dedicated to fighting the Ba'al and other dark forces. They assume a humanoid shape on Earth but are beings of pure power.

classAbilities.name: Guardian P.P.E. Pool
classAbilities.description: A Guardian's true base P.P.E. is equal to their P.E. attribute multiplied by 5, plus 20 per level of experience.

classAbilities.name: Precognitive & Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Instinctive precognitive sense guides them to those in need. Perfect Nightvision 500 ft (152 m). Can see the invisible, recognize illusions, and see all spectrums of light. Grants +1 on initiative and +3 on all perception rolls.

classAbilities.name: Super-Regeneration & Healing Touch
classAbilities.description: Heals 2D6 points of damage every hour naturally. Can expend P.P.E. to heal others (1 P.P.E. restores 1 HP/SDC up to the Guardian's P.E. limit) once per minute.

classAbilities.name: Nullify Magic
classAbilities.description: Can counteract spells by spending P.P.E. exceeding the incoming spell's cost. Acts as an automatic defense.

classAbilities.name: Powers of Light
classAbilities.description: Creates light energy blasts (1D6 S.D.C. per P.P.E., +3 to strike) or shields (5 S.D.C. per P.P.E.). Can illuminate areas with true sunlight that harms vampires.

classAbilities.name: Flight & Sustenance
classAbilities.description: Can hover (2 P.P.E.) or fly at 40 mph (6 P.P.E.). Does not need to eat, drink, or breathe; fed entirely by light.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerability to Light Deprivation
classAbilities.description: If trapped in darkness/Nightlands for more than 48 hours, S.D.C., H.P., and attributes diminish drastically over time.

name: Wampyr
description: A tragic offshoot of humanity turned by vampires, but who inexplicably retained their souls and free will. They possess vampiric powers and thirst for blood, but actively fight against their undead creators.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses & Perception
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 500 ft (152 m). Can smell blood up to a mile away (1.6 km) and track the scent at a 70% proficiency. Grants +1 on initiative and +3 on all perception rolls.

classAbilities.name: Mind Control Immunity
classAbilities.description: Grants +5 to save versus all forms of mind control and possession, and is completely immune to vampire mind control powers.

classAbilities.name: Blood Dependency
classAbilities.description: Must consume at least one pint of human or animal blood every three days. Failure to do so results in starvation penalties, reduced attributes, and eventual feral frenzy.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerability to Sunlight
classAbilities.description: Direct sunlight inflicts 2D6 points of damage per minute of exposure and blinds the Wampyr (-8 to strike, parry, dodge). Shade allows their regeneration to kick in.

classAbilities.name: Vampiric Invulnerability & Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from metal weapons. Immune to normal weapons (bullets, knives) which inflict half damage. Instantly regenerates 2D6 S.D.C./Hit points per melee round.

classAbilities.name: Vampiric Vulnerabilities
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from silver and wood weapons. Holy water inflicts 2D4 damage per vial.
